text: REAL, fixed at root cause. amatrix_release_resident() documents 'object remains fully usable afterwards: served from host copy', but a deferred adgeMatrix (host @x=NaN) has no host copy, so release left it dead-deferred; product-plan reuse (and any host access) then threw/NaN'd. Fix in .amatrix_release_resident (residency.R): materialize the deferred host copy before dropping the device buffer. Repro tests/testthat/test-regression-deferred-release-contract.R covers direct-contract + product-plan reuse (both fail before, pass after).
